nodes.label: Home Screen — App Blocker Section (button-nudge-up iteration)
nodes.description: Home tab showing 'Mejora tu concentración' section with social media app toggles (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, X, Facebook) all set to blocked. Below is 'Complementos del ritual' grid with 8 ritual complement cards (Meditar 10min, Leer 20p, Estudiar 40min, Respirar 5min, Gratitud 3 veces, Entrenar 30min, Journaling, Visualizar 6min, Caminar 3km, Suplementos Hecho). CTA button 'Comenzar jornada · 15 min' in teal at bottom. Mentex Tweaks dev panel visible on right with Estado=Inactivo/Activo toggle, Acento=Color principal, Estilo de Cards=Glass/Líneas/Plano, Tipografía=Geist/Inter/Manrope.

nodes.label: Mentex Tweaks Dev Panel — Estado/Acento/Cards/Tipografía controls
nodes.description: Developer overlay panel showing: AUTH (DEV) section with navigation shortcuts (Welcome skip splash, Login screen). Estado segmented control Inactivo/Activo. Acento color picker (teal). Estilo de Cards: Glass/Líneas/Plano options. Tipografía: Geist/Inter/Manrope options. Used for rapid UI theming iteration during development.
